steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: The first sentence describes lowering the voting age. The second sentence describes people gaining a new opportunity to participate. The connection is causal: the action enables the consequence.

steps.title: Choose the transition that shows consequence
steps.content: ”As a result” directly shows how the voting age reduction produces the opportunity for participation. Nevertheless and By contrast introduce opposition or comparison that contradicts the logical flow, while Similarly suggests mere similarity rather than consequence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
